title: Lewis & Clark Application Essays
html:
TL;DR

  • College application essays drafted by Valeria for Lewis & Clark College — two prompts: identity-difference encounter + personal motto
  • Identity essay anchors on Valeria's YES Kennedy Lugar full-paid scholarship trip to South Africa junior year, learning from a local boy named Paul
  • Pivots to a Jewish friend being slurred by a peer and Valeria educating the peer on the word's history — "blossomed into a more knowledgeable, respectable, welcoming human being"
  • Motto essay adopts "Keep Moving Forward" from the Meet the Robinsons film as personal manifesto
  • Frames first-gen Latina identity + 7-AP-class workload + parents-as-immigrants as the resilience source — the same Valeria voice that powers 2023 01 09 valeria osac
  • Career goal stated: become an immigration lawyer

Notes

January 2023 — Valeria's Lewis & Clark application drafts. Two prompts answered side-by-side with Yahir likely lightly editing (this is in his Drive).

Prompt 1 — Identity / engaging-with-difference: Valeria reuses the same South Africa YES program full-scholarship trip from junior year that anchors her other 2023 college essays. The takeaway character is Paul, a local boy. The pivot move is unusual for a college essay: she connects the South Africa lesson to a domestic moment — a peer used an antisemitic slur against her Jewish friend and Valeria walked him through the word's etymology rather than escalating.

Prompt 2 — Personal motto: "Keep Moving Forward" — lifted from Meet the Robinsons (2007), her favorite childhood movie. The essay is a near-perfect parallel of the OSU-app immigrant-resilience template — first-gen Latina, parents who couldn't help with homework, jumping from basic classes to 7 APs in junior year, parental-immigration-story as fuel. Career goal: immigration lawyer.

The same "Keep Moving Forward" motto from this Disney movie shows up as Valeria's organizing identity in multiple 2023 essays — worth promoting once it surfaces a 3rd time.

Connects to: 2023 01 09 valeria osac, 2023 02 08 collegescholarships draft.
